task: Comprehensive fix: pipeline mode, paragraph breaks, chunk stitching, data cleanup, config simplification, metadata enhancement
last_action: Fixed 6 root causes: pipeline mode single_stage, paragraph breaks, chunk stitching, data folder cleanup (7 files removed), config simplification (settings.english.yaml removed), meta.json enhancement. Saved fixed Ch13 with 37 paragraph breaks. 235/235 tests pass.

session_errors.error: way1 using 'full' pipeline caused 0 paragraph breaks + 2x slower translation vs 'single_stage' which works perfectly

session_errors.error: Sentences cut at chunk boundaries when chunks joined with \n\n
